detail_text: Bullet Points: 1.Eye-catching and Sturdy: Attract attention with this joint movable figure, built to last with cutting-edge 3D printing technology. The intricate details add an element of authenticity, making it a great addition to any collection. 2.Inspiring Tool: Become an artistic mastermind with this joint movable figure. Designed for crafters and DIY lovers, it features movable joints allowing you to create a wide range of poses. Unleash your inner artist and let your imagination run free with this inspiring tool. 3.Bring Pleasant Atmosphere: Enhance your collection with this Joint Movable Figure that provides a unique experience. It is equipped with four random accessories to decorate the figure, resulting in a charming and personal touch. 4.Extensive Usage: The Joint Movable Figure can make you feel relaxed and improve your concentration, Ideal desktop decoration and enhancing your imagination. 5.Attractive Gift: Use your creativity to discover unique and dynamic poses, perfect for drawing, sculpting, or photography. You're sure to impress friends and family with this fun and flexible tool. Express your love and care with a great gift idea for holidays, birthdays or any day. Transform your living space with the exquisitely crafted 3D Printed Figures! Durable and cute, they become mesmerizing companions that improve your focus and concentration. Specification: Name: Joint Movable Figure Product size: about 13.7CM/5.5IN Features: Multi-joint movable Material: PLA Packing List: 1* 3D Printed Figure
detail_html:
Bullet Points:

  • 1.Eye-catching and Sturdy: Attract attention with this joint movable figure, built to last with cutting-edge 3D printing technology. The intricate details add an element of authenticity, making it a great addition to any collection.
  • 2.Inspiring Tool: Become an artistic mastermind with this joint movable figure. Designed for crafters and DIY lovers, it features movable joints allowing you to create a wide range of poses. Unleash your inner artist and let your imagination run free with this inspiring tool.
  • 3.Bring Pleasant Atmosphere: Enhance your collection with this Joint Movable Figure that provides a unique experience. It is equipped with four random accessories to decorate the figure, resulting in a charming and personal touch.

product.desc:
Bullet Points:

  • 1.Eye-catching and Sturdy: Attract attention with this joint movable figure, built to last with cutting-edge 3D printing technology. The intricate details add an element of authenticity, making it a great addition to any collection.
  • 2.Inspiring Tool: Become an artistic mastermind with this joint movable figure. Designed for crafters and DIY lovers, it features movable joints allowing you to create a wide range of poses. Unleash your inner artist and let your imagination run free with this inspiring tool.
  • 3.Bring Pleasant Atmosphere: Enhance your collection with this Joint Movable Figure that provides a unique experience. It is equipped with four random accessories to decorate the figure, resulting in a charming and personal touch.
  • 4.Extensive Usage: The Joint Movable Figure can make you feel relaxed and improve your concentration, Ideal desktop decoration and enhancing your imagination.
  • 5.Attractive Gift: Use your creativity to discover unique and dynamic poses, perfect for drawing, sculpting, or photography. You're sure to impress friends and family with this fun and flexible tool. Express your love and care with a great gift idea for holidays, birthdays or any day.
  • Transform your living space with the exquisitely crafted 3D Printed Figures! Durable and cute, they become mesmerizing companions that improve your focus and concentration.

  • Name: Joint Movable Figure
  • Product size: about 13.7CM/5.5IN
  • Features: Multi-joint movable
  • Material: PLA

  • 1* 3D Printed Figure

Size:13/13.5cm

Packing : OPP bag

Specifications:As shown in the figure ( You need to assemble it yourself )

This link will constantly update new products of the same model. You can collect this link and pay attention to my store.

The shipping place in China is far away. If you have any questions about products, you can contact the customer service of the store as soon as possible, and we will try our best to give you a satisfactory solution.

notes:

1. Due to various factors such as monitor brightness and light brightness, the actual color of the product may be slightly different from the picture displayed on the website.

2. Please allow the data to have a slight manual measurement deviation (± 3 cm).

3. Handmade products may be slightly embarrassing, please do not buy them. The price is very good, I hope you receive a satisfied product.
